apply: Determine the union and intersection of two or more sets.
Find the difference of two sets and the complement of a set.
Illustrate the concept of a Venn diagram.
analyze: Compare and contrast different types of sets and their properties.
Analyze and interpret the results of set operations such as union, intersection, and difference.
remember: Recall the basic definition of a set and its types.
Identify the elements of a set and the order of elements in a set.
State the difference between a set and a combination of elements.
understand: Explain the concept of subset, superset, and equal sets.
Understand the concept of finite and infinite sets.
Define the union and intersection of sets and illustrate with examples.

ncert_objectives: Operations on sets (union, intersection, difference and complement)
Properties of sets (e.g. commutative, associative, distributive)
board_exam_objectives: Define and explain the basic concepts of sets, subsets, and power sets.
Determine the union, intersection, difference, and complement of sets.
Use Venn diagrams to represent set operations.
